ratings.comment: Like most of the other GenBus 360 professors, Dr. Ness assigns a lot of homework and the class is very time consuming. But, Dr. Ness is a much stricter grader than the other professors. He also leaves feedback that is very rude and not helpful. Overall, he is not a kind professor and should not be teaching anything about communications.

The whole class is about achieving effective communication yet the whole set of the class is disorganized. Every assignment description is repetitive to the point where it does not make sense. There is no structure.
So much homework and he writes terrible directions.
